name: Cassolette of Langoustine
recipeInstructions:
Fish stock, roux, salt, and pepper.
Shell the langoustine.
Soak the scallops in cold running water to clean them.
In a saute pan, heat the oil and butter. Saute the shallots.
Add the langoustine, salt, pepper, and scallops. Cook quickly, ensuring they are left slightly underdone; remove the langoustine and scallops with a slotted spoon and drain.
Deglaze with lemon juice and vermouth.
Add cream, fish veloute, salt, and pepper. Cook until the sauce is thick and smooth, whisking occasionally.
Add julienned vegetables, langoustine, and scallops. Cook briefly until heated through.
On individual serving plates, arrange three langoustine and one scallop. Pour sauce and julienned vegetables over the top and garnish with chopped parsley.
